description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image and a pip cache at .cache/pip with a virtualenv cache. Define a single pages job that runs in the default test stage, executes the before_script commands: python -V, pip install virtualenv, virtualenv venv, source venv/bin/activate, pip install -r requirements.txt, then runs python ./website-gen.py. Publish the generated public/ directory as a Pages artifact and restrict the job to the master branch only. Set the variable PIP_CACHE_DIR to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache and cache both .cache/pip and the venv/ directory.
